# redpanda_role_binding (Resource)

Binds a role to an account (user or service account), optionally scoped to a specific resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String) The ID of the account (user or service account) to bind the role to
- `role_name` (String) The name of the role to bind

### Optional

- `scope_resource_id` (String) The ID of the resource to scope the role binding to. Required when scope_resource_type is set.
- `scope_resource_type` (String) The type of resource to scope the role binding to. Valid values: resource_group, network, cluster, serverless_cluster, network_peering, organization. If not set, the role binding is at the organization level.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the role binding
